prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.3L 20V turbocharged inline-5 (engine code: **RR 3B**) from the Audi S2, featuring a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger**, **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)**, and **ARP head studs** for increased boost tolerance (targeting 1.2 bar / 17.5 psi). Pair with a **034 Motorsport billet crankshaft** and **Ferrea Racing intake/exhaust valves** for high-RPM durability.

Full **KW Variant 3 coilover suspension** with **polyurethane bushings (Powerflex Black Series)** and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** to eliminate B3 chassis flex. Upgrade to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors front, 280mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** for track-capable stopping power.

Custom **ECU remap by Dastek (South Africa)** for the **Bosch Motronic MA1.2.1** system, optimizing fueling for **ID1000x injectors** and **Walbro 255 lph fuel pump**. Add a **Tial MV-R 50mm external wastegate** with **TurboSmart Kompact blow-off valve** for precise boost control. Exhaust system: **Supersprint 63.5mm stainless headers** with **2.5-inch MagnaFlow cat-back (resonated)** for aggressive tone without drone.
estetica: **Rieger Tuning B3/B4-style widebody kit** (fiberglass, bolt-on) with **custom front splitter (carbon fiber, 3D-printed mounting brackets)** and **rear diffuser by Maxton Design (polyurethane, 3-piece)**. Paint: **Audi Nogaro Blue (LX5Y) with matte black accents (3M 1080 vinyl wrap)** on the hood, roof, and mirrors.

**OMP Corsica carbon fiber seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** and **custom aluminum rear seat delete panel (powder-coated satin black)**. Steering wheel: **Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede)** with **NRG quick-release hub** and **custom Audi quattro emblem horn button (laser-engraved).**

**Hella Rallye 3000 headlights (DEPO reproduction, H4 bulbs)** with **custom CREE LED angel eyes (5000K)** and **PIAA 520 fog lights (yellow bulbs)**. Wheels: **BBS RS-GT (16x8 ET35 front, 16x9 ET20 rear)** with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (205/45/16 front, 225/40/16 rear)**. Rear wing: **Volk Racing TE37V-inspired custom aluminum wing (2.5mm plate, adjustable angle)** mounted on **custom steel risers (TIG-welded).**
